home.headline: Your well-being, our priority
home.subtitle: Multidisciplinary therapy practice in Molenbeek. Physiotherapy, psychology and medical pedicure in a caring environment.

services.headline: Our Services
services.subtitle: A holistic approach to your physical and mental health

about.headline: Our Story
about.subtitle: Founded by Salah Assbane, our practice supports residents of Molenbeek and Brussels toward lasting well-being.

contact.headline: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Book an appointment or ask us your questions. We are here to listen.

physiotherapy.name: Physiotherapy
physiotherapy.shortDesc: Rehabilitation, pain relief and recovery after injury or surgery.
physiotherapy.longDesc: Our team of physiotherapists uses manual techniques, therapeutic exercises and modern technologies to help you regain mobility and reduce pain.

psychology.name: Psychology
psychology.shortDesc: Psychological support for stress, anxiety, depression and life transitions.
psychology.longDesc: In a confidential and caring space, our psychologists support you with evidence-based approaches to help you overcome your challenges.

pedicure.name: Medical Pedicure
pedicure.shortDesc: Professional foot care for your health and daily comfort.
pedicure.longDesc: Our medical pedicurists treat common foot problems with strict hygiene standards and special attention to diabetic patients.

other.name: Other Services
other.shortDesc: Complementary services for comprehensive health care.
other.longDesc: We also offer other therapeutic services to meet all your health needs.

founder.name: Salah Assbane
founder.bio: Passionate about health and well-being, Salah founded Assbane Therapy with the vision of providing quality, accessible and personalized care to the residents of Molenbeek.

member2.name: Dr. Leila Benali
member2.bio: Specialized in cognitive behavioral therapy, Leila supports her patients with empathy and professionalism.

member3.name: Sophie Vandenberghe
member3.bio: Qualified in medical pedicure, Sophie brings specific expertise in diabetic foot care.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: What our patients say about us

items.quote: Thanks to Salah, I regained my mobility after knee surgery. Professional, attentive and highly skilled.
items.author: Marie D.

items.quote: A space where you feel heard and respected. My psychologist helped me through a very difficult period.
items.author: Ahmed K.

items.quote: Finally professional foot care close to home. The hygiene is impeccable and the team is very gentle.
items.author: Fatima B.

items.question: How do I book an appointment?
items.answer: You can reach us by phone, email or through the contact form on our website. We will respond within 24 hours.

items.question: Do you accept health insurance?
items.answer: Yes, we work with most Belgian health insurance funds. Feel free to contact us to verify your coverage.

items.question: What are your opening hours?
items.answer: We are open Monday to Friday from 8am to 7pm, and Saturday from 9am to 2pm. Evening appointments are available by request.

items.question: In which languages do you consult?
items.answer: Our team speaks French, Dutch and English. We can also communicate in Arabic.

items.question: How much does a session cost?
items.answer: Rates vary by service. A physiotherapy session costs between €25 and €45, with partial reimbursement through health insurance.

items.question: Is the practice wheelchair accessible?
items.answer: Yes, our practice is fully wheelchair accessible and there is parking nearby.
